'''Fondor''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Fondor system/Legends|Fondor system]].

==History==
In [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], [[Centerpoint Station]] was fired by [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], sending a colossal, thousand-kilometer wide beam of gravitic energy through the Fondor system. Had the beam struck the star, a supernova would have occurred. As it was, [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor's]] primary escaped destruction.<ref name="aoc2">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref>
